Milton, the shipment arrived, but two boxes are damaged and one bracelet is missing. The opening is in twelve days.
Thank you for telling me, Karen. I acknowledge the problem, and let me reassure you: we will make this right before the opening.
I checked the paperwork twice, so there is a real discrepancy between what we ordered and what came.
Understood. I am escalating this to me directly. We will reimburse the two damaged pieces and reinstate the missing bracelet by express.
That is a relief. And the boxes were damaged in transit, not at your end?
In transit, yes. The liability is the carriers, but I will cover everything as a goodwill gesture while it is outstanding.
Karen told me there was a discrepancy, so I am escalating it to me directly.

Hi Milton, it is Karen from Halstead, and I am afraid I am calling with a problem. The shipment arrived this morning, but two of the necklace boxes were damaged in transit, and one bracelet is missing from the order entirely. I checked the paperwork twice, so there is a real discrepancy between what we ordered and what reached us. I am not upset with you, but the store opening is in twelve days, and right now I am short on stock. I would really like to know what you can do, and how quickly. Please call me back today if you can. I want to sort this out before it becomes a bigger issue. Thank you, Milton.

Hey team, Milton here. We have a situation with the Halstead order, so listen closely. Karen told me that two boxes were damaged in transit and that one bracelet never arrived, and she said there was a discrepancy in the paperwork. Here is how we handle it. First, I already called her back and acknowledged the problem honestly, because hiding it would cost us the relationship. I promised her I would reimburse the damaged pieces and ship a replacement bracelet by express, and I told her we would cover that cost as a goodwill gesture. I want this escalated to me directly, not buried in a queue. Reassure her at every step, keep her updated daily, and let us turn an outstanding problem into the reason she trusts us for years. A problem handled well is worth more than a delivery that just goes smoothly. Thanks, everyone.
